title: Add scheduled automatic backups
description: Automated scheduled exports via chrome.alarms and chrome.downloads with File System Access API support. Three save modes: Downloads folder, custom folder (iCloud/Desktop/external), or choose each time. New files: background.js, js/scheduled-backup.js. Modified: manifest.json, newtab.html, newtab.js, newtab.css, js/backup.js.

title: Add Edit URL to bookmark context menu
description: Right-clicking a bookmark shows Edit title but no way to edit the URL. Added Edit URL menu item using the same inline-edit pattern. Changes in js/render.js and newtab.css.
